DescribeMetaSyncRules.filters: Filter conditions (see Filter appendix). Multiple filters are AND-related; multiple values within a filter are OR-related. Supported fields: * name=dataSrcId, filter by data source ID, e.g. value=["ds-AOLmxozuEqas", "ds-kykIYfOmY9ZU"]; * name=metaSyncRuleId, e.g. value=["ms-HljnqUtZBazs", "ms-Jz6lAqoiYJxI"]
DescribeMetaSyncRules.filters.name: Field to filter on; multiple filters are AND-related. Example: zone
DescribeMetaSyncRules.filters.values: Filter values for the field; multiple values are OR-related. Example: ["zoneA", "zoneB"]
DescribeMetaSyncRules.maxKeys: Maximum number of items to return. Valid range: [1, 1000]. Default: 100
DescribeMetaSyncRules.marker: Starting position for paginated list retrieval. The list is sorted by metaSyncRuleId lexicographically. Use the nextMarker value from the previous response
